'''Allen Hamilton''' is an [[Wikipedia:Actor|actor]] and [[Wikipedia:Voice acting|voice artist]] who protrayed [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]] in the [[Dark Forces: The Collector's Trilogy|''Dark Forces'' audio dramas]].<ref name="Dark Forces">[[Dark Forces: The Collector's Trilogy|''Dark Forces'' audio dramas]]</ref> Hamilton also provided additional voices for the [[Crimson Empire (audio drama)|audio drama version of ''Crimson Empire'']].<ref name="Crimson Empire">[[Crimson Empire (audio drama)|''Crimson Empire'' audio drama]]</ref>

{{Bio-stub}}
